headline: Deterministic recon->map->plan CLI (gw). The compile stage's fast structural read: walks a repo into system-index.json. `index --json` emits a content-addressed receipt (sha256 of the canonical index, minus the wall-clock stamp) as the seam join key.

capabilities.label: Index a repo into system-index.json and mint a content-addressed receipt
capabilities.evidence: C:/Users/bruke/groundwork-cli/groundwork/cli.py:62 cmd_index (--json branch); pyproject.toml:15 console script gw=groundwork.cli:main
capabilities.notes: Writes <root>/.groundwork/system-index.json (a write) then prints {tool,op,sha256,subsystem_count,artifacts}. sha256 is over the canonical index with generated_at stripped -> a STABLE join key for the same tree. {root} must be a forward-slash path. Large trees may approach the 20s gateway timeout (full os.walk + per-file LOC).
